generated_oml:
instance DataReceived : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation of data reception from physical sensors"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature predictions for system behavior"
]

instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection alerts for system monitoring"
]

instance BangBangHeatingCycles : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Bang-bang heating cycles for temperature control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimizedHeatingParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized heating parameters for the incubator system"
]

instance CalibratedModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal model parameters from experimental validation"
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Transmission of sensor data via RabbitMQ server"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataReceived
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection through monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control via bang-bang logic"
    DTDFVocab:provides BangBangHeatingCycles
]

instance ParameterOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of heating parameters through model-based simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizedHeatingParameters
]

instance ModelCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model calibration via non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParameters
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ for messaging in the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware for controlling digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, FaultDetectionService, SupervisoryControlService, ParameterOptimizationService
]

instance PythonScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy for parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelCalibrationService
]

instance PCBDesignToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PCB design tools for creating the custom PCB"
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 2 parameters: C_air, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model with 4 parameters: C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipyEnabler
]

instance TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 1-Wire digital thermometer with 64-bit unique serial code, measuring temperature from -55°C to +125°C with ±0.5°C accuracy between -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor1, TemperatureSensor2, TemperatureSensor3
]

instance TemperatureDataRaw : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, RaspberryPi4Enabler
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for incubator system, dimensions 214 × 214 × 3 mm"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation, airflow 0.02 m³/s"
]

instance StyrofoamInsulatedContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Component : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller hardware"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for driving the heatbed (4A current)"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the incubator system"
]

instance IncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains StyrofoamInsulatedContainer, Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensor1, TemperatureSensor2, TemperatureSensor3, RaspberryPi4Component, CustomPCB, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the DT are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which executes them on the physical components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A centralized system comprising RabbitMQ server (on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, and thermal simulation models, communicating via RabbitMQ message queue."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates during the 'as operated' phase of the physical system's lifecycle, integrating deployed models for real-time monitoring and control post-deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation of uniform temperature assumption via sensor placement experiments (max 7°C discrepancy with 12V fan), residual error minimization during calibration, and model parameter optimization against experimental data."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication via RabbitMQ server running on Raspberry Pi, handling data exchange between physical and virtual components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT components (RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver) hosted on a Raspberry Pi 4 Model B single-board computer."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "A safe protocol integrated into the low-level driver to prevent unsafe actuator states, ensuring physical system safety during operations."
]
